title: Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa
tagline: Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa — spiritual town of Goa

overview.short: Shri Damodar Temple Zambaulim or Shri Damodara Sansthaan is a Hindu temple on the bank of the Kushawati River near the village of Zambaulim 22 km from the city of Margao on the bor
overview.description: Shri Damodar Temple Zambaulim or Shri Damodara Sansthaan is a Hindu temple on the bank of the Kushawati River near the village of Zambaulim 22 km from the city of Margao on the border of Quepem region (Quepem taluk) in the south of Goa. The temple houses a celebrated murti, or image, of Shiva incarnated as Damodar.

topPlaces.name: Zambaulim
topPlaces.description: Zambaulim is a village in South Goa, Goa.

topPlaces.name: Rivona
topPlaces.description: Rivona or Rivana is a census town in Sanguem taluka, South Goa district in the Indian state of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Vimleshwar Temple
topPlaces.description: Vimaleshwar Temple is located in Rivona village of Sanguem taluka in the state of Goa, India. Vimaleshwar is a form of Shiva and is worshiped in the form of a Shivalinga.

topPlaces.name: Quepem
topPlaces.description: Quepem is a town and the capital of kushavati district in the Indian state of Goa. The town is the administrative headquarters of the Quepem taluka (sub-district).

topPlaces.name: Nanda Lake
topPlaces.description: Nanda lake is a Ramsar site located in the Indian state of Goa. It is situated in Curchorem.

topPlaces.name: Usgalimal rock engravings
topPlaces.description: The Usgalimal rock engravings or Usgalimal petroglyphs at Usgalimal village, in South Goa, is one of the most important prehistoric sites in Western India.

topPlaces.name: Curchorem
topPlaces.description: Curchorem (Kudchade)(Also known as 'Vodlemol cacora') is a city and municipal council in the Kushavati district of Goa, India. Curchorem is a part of the Quepem taluka and is a twin town with Sanvordem, both located on either side of the Zuari River.

topPlaces.name: Sanvordekar Wada
topPlaces.description: Sanvordekar Wada is a joint‑family mansion in Sanvordem, Sanguem taluka, Goa, described as a "house of solidarity and spiritual unions" housing over 300 members of the Sanvordekar family.

items.note: Zambaulim is a village in South Goa, Goa.
Rivona or Rivana is a census town in Sanguem taluka, South Goa district in the Indian state of Goa.
Vimaleshwar Temple is located in Rivona village of Sanguem taluka in the state of Goa, India. Vimaleshwar is a form of Shiva and is worshiped in the form of a Shivalinga.
Quepem is a town and the capital of kushavati district in the Indian state of Goa. The town is the administrative headquarters of the Quepem taluka (sub-district).
Nanda lake is a Ramsar site located in the Indian state of Goa. It is situated in Curchorem.
The Usgalimal rock engravings or Usgalimal petroglyphs at Usgalimal village, in South Goa, is one of the most important prehistoric sites in Western India.

Curchorem (Kudchade)(Also known as 'Vodlemol cacora') is a city and municipal council in the Kushavati district of Goa, India. Curchorem is a part of the Quepem taluka and is a twin town with Sanvordem, both located on either side of the Zuari River.
Sanvordekar Wada is a joint‑family mansion in Sanvordem, Sanguem taluka, Goa, described as a "house of solidarity and spiritual unions" housing over 300 members of the Sanvordekar family.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Damodar Sansthaan, Goa?
faq.a: The top attractions are Zambaulim, Rivona, Vimleshwar Temple, Quepem, Nanda Lake.
